2024-08-02T15:49:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) between Hok Yuen Street and Tai Wan Road are closed to all traffic. 
Vehicles are prohibited from making right turn from Fat Kwong Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) and making left turn from Man Yue Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound). Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Affected bus routes have to be diverted:
- 5D, 12A, 115 (Telford Gardens/ Whampoa Gardens/ Central bound)
- 3B, 5C, 11K, 11X, 15,15X, 21, 45, 241X (Hung Hom/ Tsim Sha Tsui Ferry/ Lai Yiu/ Cheung Tsing bound)
- 85X, 297, 297P (Hung Hom (Hung Luen Road) bound)
- 2E, 6C, 6F, 106, 106P (Pak Tin/ Mei Foo/ Lai Kok/ Siu Sai Wan bound)
- 7B, 8 (Hung Hom/ Tsim Sha Tsui bound).  Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-02T15:49:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管爆裂，馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)介乎鶴園街與大環道之間的全線現已封閉。
車輛禁止由佛光街右轉入馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)及禁止由民裕街左轉入馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)。駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。
受影響巴士路線須改道行駛：
-路線5D,12A,115 (往德福花園/黃埔花園/中環方向)
-路線3B,5C,11K,11X,15,15X,21,45,241X (往紅磡/尖沙咀碼頭/麗瑤/長青方向)
-路線85X,297,297P (往紅磡(紅鸞道)方向)
-路線2E,6C,6F,106,106P (往白田/美孚/麗閣/小西灣方向)
-路線7B,8 (往紅磡/尖沙咀方向)。  現時上址交通繁忙。

The traffic arrangement of banning right turn from Fat Kwong Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) and left turn from Man Yue Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) which were implemented before are now cancelled.

2024-08-06T13:45:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2024-08-06T13:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。
